MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2024 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT EQUINOX FITNESS SC SAN FRANCISCO, EQUINOX HOLDING, INC., EQUINOX MIDIA HOLDINGS, LLC, JENNIFER MAC NEIL'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. COUNSEL FOR DEFENSE TO SUBMIT A BRIEF DECLARATION TO THE COURT BY THURSDAY JULY 25, 2024 ADDRESSING THE FOLLOWING: 1) THE ASSERTION THAT THE ENTITIES ARE SUBSIDIARIES OF EACH OTHER AND 2) HAS DEFENSE FORFIETED THE ARGUMENT THAT THEY ARE SUBSIDIARIES BECAUSE THE ARGUMENT WAS NOT ADDRESSED IN DEFENDANT'S MOVING PAPERS. PLAINTIFF'S RESPONSE/REPLY TO DEFENDANT'S DECLARATION IS TO BE PROVIDED TO THE COURT BY MONDAY, 7/29, 2024. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/CEK)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Aug-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances via Zoom Conference
RAFAEL CRESPO, JR., ESQ. LAW OFFICES OF RAFAEL CRESPO, JR. (415) 285-2063 Attorney for Plaintiff,LARRY BEYAFI (Via ZOOM)
NEIL A.F. POPOVIC,, Esq., SHEPPARD, MULLIN, RICHTER & HAMPTON LLP 415.434.9100 npopovic@sheppardmullin.com Attorney for Defendants, EQUINOX FITNESS SC SAN FRANCISCO, EQUINOX HOLDINGS, INC., EQUINOX MEDIA HOLDINGS, LLC, and JENNIFER MAC NEIL

Hearing is held. ARGUED, The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT EQUINOX FITNESS SC SAN FRANCISCO, EQUINOX HOLDING, INC., EQUINOX MIDIA HOLDINGS, LLC, JENNIFER MAC NEIL'S Motion To Compel Arbitration is taken under submission. Counsel for Defense to submit a brief declaration to the Court by Thursday July 25, 2024 addressing the following: 1) the assertion that the entities are subsidiaries of each other and 2) has defense forfieted the argument that they are subsidiaries because the argument was not addressed in Defendant's moving papers. Plaintiff's response/reply to defendant's declaration is to be provided to the Court by Monday, 7/29, 2024.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/CEK)
